content.text:
## Synthesis Report

### Strengths
- Strong POV voice maintained throughout
- Effective use of setting details
- Dialogue carries subtext well

### Areas for Improvement
- Opening paragraph could be tighter
- Middle section pacing lags
- Final beat needs stronger emotional closure

### Priority Recommendations
1. Tighten the opening hook (first 200 words)
2. Cut redundant interior monologue in paragraphs 4-6
3. Strengthen the closing image to mirror the opening motif

### Fix Locations
- fix_location: craft — prose polish for opening/closing
- fix_location: brief — conflict needs sharper definition
- fix_location: intent — emotional arc could use value shift clarification
